evidence_summary: [CH001_SC001] Purpose: Establish the mundane reality and introduce the inciting incident (the Rabbit).

[CH001_SC001] Summary: Alice sits bored by the riverbank with her sister. The tranquility is broken when a White Rabbit in a waistcoat runs past, checking a pocket watch, prompting Alice to chase it into a rabbit-hole under a hedge.
[CH001_SC001] Coverage: Wide shots of the landscape; Medium shots of Alice and her sister; Close-ups of the White Rabbit's watch and waistcoat; Tracking shot of the chase.
[CH001_SC001] Continuity: The transition from the sunny bank to the shade of the hedge; Alice's physical movement into the hole.

[CH001] Chapter summary: **Setting:** - A riverbank (sunny, hot day). - A large rabbit-hole under a hedge. - A deep vertical well/tunnel lined with cupboards, bookshelves, maps, and pictures. - A long, low hall lit by a row of hanging lamps,...

Character alice: Alice is a young girl characterized by extreme, sudden changes in physical scale. Her size fluctuates between the stature of a small child (approximately two feet tall) and colossal proportions reaching up to nine feet or even nearly two mi...
